name: postflow-saas
description: AI-powered social media automation for local businesses

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd backend && node ./node_modules/nodemon/bin/nodemon.js server.js" "cd frontend && node ./node_modules/next/dist/bin/next dev -p 5000 -H 0.0.0.0"
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd backend && node server.js" "cd frontend && node ./node_modules/next/dist/bin/next start -p 5000 -H 0.0.0.0"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
